name: Blueberry Maple Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl or on top of a double boiler until thickened.
2. Gradually beat in the heated maple syrup.
3. Place the mixture over simmering water and cook, beating constantly, until it is slightly thickened.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Whip the heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks.
6. Gently fold the whipped cream into the egg yolk mixture.
7. Carefully fold in half of the blueberries.
8. Pour the mousse into a prepared mold and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or overnight, before serving.
